title: The Art of Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|italics=1}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:Art_of_Jedi.jpg]] |title=''The Art of Star Wars Episode VI:
Return of the Jedi'' |author=*[[Lawrence Kasdan]] *[[George Lucas]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=*[[Ballantine Books]] {{C|Original and reissue}} *[[Del Rey]] {{C|Special Edition reissue}} |release date=[[November]] [[1983]]''[[The Art of Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi]]'' |type=Softcover |pages=192 |dimensions=0.5 × 9.2 × 12.0 inches |weight=1.5 pounds |isbn=0345912713 |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''The Art of Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi''''' includes hundreds of sketches, storyboards, matte paintings, blueprints, production paintings, and costume designs which illustrate the original screenplay. Originally published in 1983 as '''''The Art of Return of the Jedi''''', the book was reissued in 1994 with the expanded title, and updated in 1997 to include material from the [[The Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition|Special Edition]]. {{Book-stub}} ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from The Art of Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi}} ===Editions=== {|{{Prettytable}} ! ISBN !! Release date !! Publisher !! Pages !! Format !! Language !! Title |- | {{ISBN|0345912713}} || [[November]] [[1983]] || [[Ballantine Books]] || || Paperback || English || ''The Art of Return of the Jedi'' |- | {{ISBN|0345392043}} || [[October]] [[1994]] || Ballantine Books || || Paperback || English || ''The Art of Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi'' |- | || [[May 6]], [[1997]] || [[Del Rey]] || || Paperback || English || ''The Art of Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi'' |} ===Cover gallery=== File:Art_of_Jedi.jpg|1997 Special Edition File:Art_of_Jedi_Pl.jpg|Polish ==Sources== *''[[The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]'' *{{SW|url=news/jedi-at-40-marilee-heyer|text=''Jedi'' at 40 | Fashion Illustrator Marilee Heyer on Her Stunning Leia Concepts}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{ArtOf}} {{Interlang |de=The Art of Star Wars: Episode VI – Die Rückkehr der Jedi-Ritter#legends |ja=アート・オブ・スター・ウォーズ ジェダイの復讐≪特別篇≫ |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები, ეპიზოდი VI: ჯედაის დაბრუნება: მხატვრობა |pl=Powrót Jedi (album) |sr=The Art of Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Art of Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi}} [[Category:Illustrated Screenplays]] [[Category:Legends art books|Episode VI]]
